props.labelText: Dallas-Fort Worth's Indoor Air Quality Experts
props.title: Breathe Clean. Live Healthy.
props.subtitle: Professional mold remediation, UV light installation, and duct cleaning. Free inspections with before & after photo documentation on every job.

props.heading: Our Services
props.subheading: Comprehensive indoor air quality solutions for homes and businesses.

features.title: Mold Remediation
features.description: We open your HVAC plenum and eliminate mold caused by condensation buildup. EPA-registered disinfectant kills existing mold. Professional mold blocker coating seals the surface. Dramatic before & after results — documented with photos.

features.title: UV Light Installation
features.description: Hospital-grade UV lights installed inside your HVAC system make it physically impossible for mold to regrow. Your air is continuously purified 24/7 — the same technology used in hospitals and clean rooms.

features.title: Dryer Vent Cleaning
features.description: Clogged dryer vents are the #1 cause of residential fires. We thoroughly clean your entire dryer exhaust line — improving energy efficiency, reducing dry times, and eliminating a serious fire hazard.

features.title: Full Duct Cleaning
features.description: Complete duct system cleaning using professional roto brush and negative air technology. We remove years of accumulated dust, debris, and allergens while keeping your home spotless during the entire process.

props.heading: How It Works
props.content:
### Step 1 — Free Inspection
We examine your HVAC system and show you exactly what's happening inside your ducts and plenum — with photos. No obligation, no pressure.

### Step 2 — Custom Treatment Plan
Based on what we find, we recommend the right combination of cleaning, disinfection, and prevention for your home. Transparent pricing, no surprises.

### Step 3 — Professional Treatment
EPA-registered disinfectants. Professional-grade mold blocker. Hospital-grade UV lights. Your family deserves the best.

### Step 4 — Before & After Proof
We document everything with photos so you can see exactly what we did. Your air quality improvement — verified and visible.

testimonials.text: Kevin showed me photos of the mold growing inside my AC system — I had no idea it was that bad. After the cleaning and UV light installation, the air in our house feels completely different. My allergies have improved significantly.
testimonials.name: Homeowner

testimonials.text: Fast, professional, and honest. The before and after photos were night and day. The UV light gives me peace of mind that the mold won't come back. Highly recommend.
testimonials.name: Homeowner

testimonials.text: We had our dryer vent cleaned and Kevin found a massive clog that could have been a fire hazard. Dryer works twice as fast now. Great service, fair price.
testimonials.name: Homeowner
